response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership through project founding and mentoring, but his German proficiency is only basic (not C1 as required), and his resume lacks explicit evidence of architectural leadership, UML expertise, or formal project management experience at an executive level.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack and cross-platform development experience across diverse tech stacks
Strong track record of mentoring, workshops, and community knowledge sharing
concerns: German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic', falling far short of required C1 level
No clear evidence of UML modeling, IT architecture design documentation, or formal technical leadership of teams
Lacks explicit experience in client advisory, requirements management, or compliance/risk frameworks for IT consulting
